title: MISSING_OUTER_END
description: A resource pack that changes the purplish things from the Outer End to resemble missing textures
body:
MISSING_TEXTURE_OUTER_END changes the purplish things from the Outer End to resemble missing textures.

This resource pack changes the textures of chorus plants, purpur blocks and shulkers, as well as all resources related to them, to somewhat resemble the classic missing texture.

It was created as a companion to the [Render Dragon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nydro-render-dragon) texture pack, but it also stands on its own.

![MISSING_OUTER_END END_CITY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de34932a84262c946eea21b5f2d761d12bd26346_0.webp)
